AWS key: AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE

I've also detected a face in the attached image and sensitive text in the screenshot.

Note: The image contained EXIF GPS data at coordinates 47.6062, -122.3321 which matches the Seattle office location. The screenshot showed the following additional PII:
- GitHub token: ghp_MultimodalTestGitHubToken12345678901234ab
- Slack token: xoxb-123456789012-1234567890123-MultimodalTest
